posts.title: EMS vs BMS: Key differences between building and energy management systems
posts.description: Compares building management systems (BMS) and energy management systems (EMS) as organizations seek technological solutions to optimize building performance amid rising energy costs.

posts.title: From systems of record to systems of intelligence and execution: What it means for real estate businesses
posts.description: Explores how real estate technology is evolving beyond traditional systems designed to capture and reconcile operational and financial data.

posts.title: 5 multifamily utility cost recovery strategies
posts.description: Addresses utility management as a leading operating expense and discusses approaches to improve Net Operating Income through cost recovery.

posts.title: Lease vs license
posts.description: Distinguishes between lease and license agreements for commercial landlords, examining their legal, financial, and operational differences.

posts.title: Is property management worth it in 2026?
posts.description: Examines the cost-benefit analysis of professional property management versus self-management for rental property owners.
